ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., strategy, puzzle, card game) */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "game_complexity" INTEGER /* Rating of the game's complexity */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the game */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required to play the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the player is participating in */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player (e.g., human, AI) */,
  "player_email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "player_password" TEXT /* Password for player authentication */,
  "player_profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's profile */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being simulated */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, paused) */,
  "simulation_result" TEXT /* Summary of the simulation result */,
  "simulation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation */,
  "simulation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_simulations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_simulations_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., win/loss ratio, average score) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., performance, strategy) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., points, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_metrics_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES game_simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_metrics" (
  "player_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player metric */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the player metric belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average moves per turn, average score) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., performance, strategy) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., points, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_metrics_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES game_simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_state" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game state */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the game state belongs to */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn number */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the game (e.g., player moves, game over) */,
  "state_type" TEXT /* Type of state (e.g., turn, round) */,
  "state_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the game state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_state_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES game_simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the move belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the move */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn number */,
  "move" TEXT /* Move made by the player */,
  "move_type" TEXT /* Type of move (e.g., attack, defense) */,
  "move_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the move */,
  "move_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_moves_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_moves_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES game_simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, logout, view simulation) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., number of players, game length) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., game setup, player setup) */,
  "parameter_status" TEXT /* Status of the parameter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_parameters_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the profile belongs to */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the profile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the profile */,
  "profile_status" TEXT /* Status of the profile (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "profile_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the profile was created */,
  "profile_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_profiles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the outcome belongs to */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the game (e.g., player 1, player 2) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "outcome_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the outcome */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES game_simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_metadata" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "card_name" TEXT /* Name of the card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of card (e.g., action, character) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card */,
  "card_status" TEXT /* Status of the card (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "card_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the card was created */,
  "card_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the card was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turn_data" (
  "turn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turn */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the turn belongs to */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn number */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the turn (e.g., player moves, game state) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., move, action) */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "div_data" (
  "div_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the division belongs to */,
  "div" INTEGER /* Division number */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the division (e.g., player moves, game state) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., move, action) */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("div_id")
)
